questions.question: What's the main difference between ChatGPT and Claude?
options: ChatGPT is free, Claude is paid
Claude has longer context windows and is better for detailed document analysis
They're exactly the same
Claude can't generate text

options: Only ChatGPT paid version
ChatGPT Free, Google Gemini, Canva AI, Grammarly Free
Every AI tool available

options: For all your work
Never, only use stock photos
When creating visuals for content, product mockups, marketing materials, or concept visualization
Only if you're a professional designer

questions.question: What is a 'multi-modal AI'?
options: AI that works on multiple devices
AI that can process and generate multiple types of content (text, images, audio, video)
AI with multiple modes like dark mode
AI for transportation

questions.question: When should you NOT use AI?
options: For writing emails
For creating content
For medical diagnoses, legal advice, or high-stakes decisions without human oversight
For research

5-7 hours
10-15 hours
20+ hours

options: Data entry speed
Memorization

questions.question: How should you evaluate a new AI tool?
options: Just try every new tool that comes out
Ignore all new tools and stick with what you know
Assess if it solves a real problem, saves time, has reasonable learning curve and cost
Only use it if everyone else is using it

questions.question: What's the recommended approach to AI-generated content?
options: Never disclose that AI was used

Only use AI in secret
